intentSynonyms: get a workflow history in temporal
look up a workflow history in temporal
fetch a single workflow history in temporal
view one specific workflow history in temporal
get workflow event history for debugging in temporal
description: Get the event history for a workflow execution. Events include workflow started, activity scheduled/started/completed/failed, timer fired, signals received, and more. Essential for debugging workflow behavior and understanding failures.

namespace.description: Temporal namespace (e.g., "prod-us-west-2.abc123"). Defaults to the namespace in the current browser tab.

run_id.description: Run ID (optional — uses latest run if omitted)

next_page_token.description: Pagination token from a previous response
